title: Costs
description: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.

subtitles.monthly_utilized: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.
subtitles.debit_minus_credit: Debit minus credit for the selected period
subtitles.estimated_debits: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
subtitles.threshold_crossings: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
subtitles.budget_approvals_awaiting: Budget override approvals awaiting board action

cards.inference_ledger_desc: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
cards.finance_ledger_desc: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
cards.by_agent_desc: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
cards.by_project_desc: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
cards.by_biller_desc: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
cards.budget_control_desc: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.

budgets.agent_policy: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
budgets.project_policy: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.
budgets.resolve_hard_stops: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.

incident_card.project_paused: Project execution is paused. New work in this project will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
incident_card.scope_paused: This scope is paused. New heartbeats will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
incident_card.budget_must_exceed: The new budget must exceed current observed spend.

policy_card.project_paused: Execution is paused for this project until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.
policy_card.scope_paused: Heartbeats are paused for this scope until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.

empty.select_company: Select a company to view costs.
empty.no_finance_events: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.
empty.no_finance_events_overview: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.
empty.no_cost_events_period: No cost events in this period.
empty.no_billable_events: No billable events in this period.
empty.select_date_range: Select a start and end date to load data.
empty.no_budget_policies: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.

finance_timeline.title: Recent financial events
finance_timeline.description: Top-ups, fees, credits, commitments, and other non-request charges.
finance_timeline.no_events: No financial events in this period.

finance_kind.title: Financial event mix
finance_kind.description: Account-level charges grouped by event kind.
finance_kind.no_events: No finance events in this period.
